params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: page
params.description: The page number to retrieve

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of batches per page

params.name: from
params.description: Filter batches sent from this date

params.name: to
params.description: Filter batches sent up to this date

items.docs: Returns a list of batches with pagination support. You can filter batches by various criteria including start date and end date.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

items.docs: Sends a batch of SMS messages. A batch can contain one or more messages to one or more recipients. The API supports scheduled delivery, parameterized messages, and delivery report configuration.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: batch_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the batch

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific batch identified by the batch ID.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: batch_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the batch

items.docs: Updates a batch message. Only batches that have not yet been delivered can be updated.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: batch_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the batch

items.docs: Cancels a batch that has not yet been delivered. A batch can only be canceled if it has not yet started sending.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: batch_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the batch

items.docs: Performs a dry run of a batch without actually sending messages. This can be used to validate the batch configuration and estimate the number of recipients.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: batch_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the batch

params.name: type
params.description: The type of delivery report to retrieve

items.docs: Returns the aggregate delivery report for a specific batch. The report contains status counts and details about message delivery.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: batch_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the batch

params.name: recipient_msisdn
params.description: The phone number of the recipient

items.docs: Returns the delivery report for a specific recipient in a batch.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: page
params.description: The page number to retrieve

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of reports per page

items.docs: Returns a list of delivery reports with pagination support.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: page
params.description: The page number to retrieve

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of groups per page

items.docs: Returns a list of groups with pagination support.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

items.docs: Creates a new group of phone numbers that can be used as recipients when sending SMS batches.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: group_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the group

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific group.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: group_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the group

items.docs: Updates an existing group by adding or removing members or changing the group name.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: group_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the group

items.docs: Deletes a group and all its members.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: group_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the group

items.docs: Returns the list of phone numbers that are members of the specified group.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: page
params.description: The page number to retrieve

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of messages per page

params.name: to
params.description: Filter by destination number

params.name: start_date
params.description: Filter messages received after this date

params.name: end_date
params.description: Filter messages received before this date

items.docs: Returns a list of inbound (Mobile Originated) messages with pagination support. Messages can be filtered by start date and end date.

params.name: service_plan_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the service plan

params.name: inbound_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the inbound message

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific inbound message.
